title: Memory, Context Windows, Compaction, and Retrieval · Operations Recall
summary: Keep a long-running agent grounded without unlimited history. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a context and durable-memory policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep only current decision-relevant state in working context.
Store stable facts with provenance, scope, freshness, and deletion rules.
Retrieve the smallest authoritative evidence set for the next decision.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:

stimulus.title: Memory Privacy case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case for loops memory context that tests this competency: Minimize sensitive retention and honor access, correction, and deletion boundaries.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Agent convenience justifies indefinite data retention.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Minimize sensitive retention and honor access, correction, and deletion boundaries. Artifact under review: a context and durable-memory policy.

options.text: The Memory Privacy record says a context and durable-memory policy looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Memory Privacy without its stated preconditions, omit the a context and durable-memory policy trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Memory Privacy for a context and durable-memory policy.
The record names the assumption, applies Memory Privacy, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
